# better-inbox

In-app notifications as a better-auth plugin. Notifications are rows in the app's own database (any better-auth adapter), addressed by better-auth user ids, optionally org-scoped via the better-auth organization plugin.

## Install & wire

npm install better-inbox

// server: lib/auth.ts
import { inbox } from "better-inbox";
export const auth = betterAuth({ plugins: [inbox()] });
// then: npx @better-auth/cli migrate  (creates the `notification` table)

// client: lib/auth-client.ts
import { inboxClient } from "better-inbox/client";
export const authClient = createAuthClient({ plugins: [inboxClient()] });

// UI (client component)
import { InboxButton } from "better-inbox/react";
<InboxButton client={authClient} onNavigate={(href) => router.push(href)} />

## Send (server-only, never an HTTP route)

await auth.api.notify({ body: { userId, type: "comment.reply", title: "...", href: "/x", body: "...", data: {...} } });
// org fan-out (requires better-auth organization plugin); one row per member:
await auth.api.notify({ body: { organizationId, roles: ["owner","admin"], type: "billing.payment_failed", title: "..." } });
// exactly one of userId | organizationId. Fan-out capped at inbox({ maxFanout: 1000 }).

## Read/mutate (session-scoped to caller)

auth.api.listNotifications({ headers, query: { filter: "unread"|"all", limit: 20, offset: 0, organizationId } }) → { notifications, hasMore }
auth.api.markRead({ headers, body: { id } })
auth.api.markAllRead({ headers, body: { organizationId? } })
auth.api.unreadCount({ headers, query: { organizationId? } }) → { count }
// same methods on the client: authClient.inbox.list / markRead / markAllRead / unreadCount

## React hook

const { notifications, unreadCount, isLoading, hasMore, loadMore, markRead, markAllRead, refresh } = useInbox(authClient, { pollInterval: 30000, pageSize: 20, organizationId });
// polling refetches unread count; full refresh on window focus and panel open. markRead/markAllRead are optimistic.

## Notes

- notification fields: id, userId, organizationId?, type, title, body?, href?, data? (json), read (boolean), createdAt
- components styled with shadcn CSS variables (bg-popover, text-muted-foreground, ...); zero runtime deps; shadcn not required
- recommend manual index on (userId, createdAt)
- community plugin, not affiliated with better-auth
